description_long: This is a robust hammer with a large, rectangular metallic head featuring beveled edges and a smooth, slightly reflective surface. The head is adorned with a distinct, engraved symbol on one side, adding a decorative or possibly emblematic touch. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a brown, textured grip that appears to be made of leather or a similar material, providing both comfort and slip resistance. At the base of the handle, there is a looped strap, likely for securing the hammer to the user's wrist or for hanging storage. The overall construction suggests durability and strength, suitable for heavy-duty tasks. The hammer's design is reminiscent of iconic or ceremonial hammers, with a blend of functional and ornamental elements.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a large, metallic rectangular head, engraved symbol, and a brown, textured handle with a looped strap. The design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat face of the hammer head and the full length of the brown, textured handle with the looped strap visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the engraved symbol on the hammer head and the rectangular shape, with the handle's grip and strap clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite flat face of the hammer head, with the handle and strap in alignment, no engravings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plain side of the hammer head, with the handle and strap visible, but no engravings.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in brown textured leather with a looped strap at the base for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges and a flat striking face, featuring an engraved symbol on one side.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Engraved symbol visible, no brand name or manufacturer logo.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Looped strap at the base of the handle
